prompt: Run only Phase 1 Intake for coding-task-workflow with `ISSUE: 42`. I also typed `WORK_ITEM: maybe clean up auth later`, but the GitHub issue body actually describes a CSV import bug that silently drops rows. Tell me what Intake should do and what it should use as the work item.
assertions: Says Intake should fetch/read the GitHub issue title or body before classification
Treats the GitHub issue body as the authoritative source for `WORK_ITEM`
Does not treat `maybe clean up auth later` as the primary work item
Uses the supplied issue as the Phase 1 parent issue rather than creating a new parent issue
